ocr.text: In the analysis of various parameters, the results indicate the following: for Age, the coefficient is 0.113 with a standard error
(S.E.) of 0.176, a Wald statistic of 0.410, a significance level (Sig.) of 0.522, an Exp(B) of 1.120, and a 95.0% confidence
interval (CI) for Exp(B) ranging from 0.792 to 1.582. For Gender, the coefficient is −0.233, S.E. of 0.201, Wald of 1.349, Sig.
of 0.245, Exp(B) of 0.792, and a CI from 0.534 to 1.174. Histological types show a coefficient of 0.201, S.E. of 0.170, Wald of
1.408, Sig. of 0.235, Exp(B) of 1.223, with a CI from 0.877 to 1.706. LNM status has a coefficient of 0.402, S.E.
Parameter  B  S.E.  Wald  Sig.  Exp(B)  95.0%CI for Exp(B)
Lower  Upper
of 0.196, Wald of 4.207, Sig. of 0.040*, Exp(B) of 1.495, and a CI from 1.018 to 2.194. Treatment strategy presents a
coefficient of 0.026, S.E. of 0.190, Wald of 0.019, Sig. of 0.891, Exp(B) of 1.026, with a CI from 0.708 to 1.489. Clinical stages
yield a coefficient of 0.691, S.E. of 0.197, Wald of 12.331, Sig. of 0.000*, Exp(B) of 1.996, and a CI from 1.357 to 2.936.
Pathological grades show a coefficient of 0.435, S.E. of 0.168, Wald of 6.696, Sig. of 0.010*, Exp(B) of 1.545, with a CI from
1.111 to 2.148. For p-Mnk1, the coefficient is 0.443, S.E. of 0.211, Wald of 4.432, Sig. of 0.035*, Exp(B) of 1.558, and a CI
from 1.031 to 2.353. Lastly, p-eIF4E has a coefficient of 0.027, S.E. of 0.185, Wald of 0.153, Sig. of 0.696, Exp(B) of 1.075,
with a CI ranging from 0.748 to 1.546.
